page_subtitle: Two squads, one club — representing Hong Kong Masters Hockey at Rotterdam 2026.
join_heading: Want to Play for HK Masters?
join_text: Are you 35 or above and passionate about field hockey? We welcome players of all abilities. Get in touch to find out more about joining one of our squads.

squads.name: Men's Over-40
squads.description: The Men's Over-40 squad is a blend of experience and energy. With players drawn from Hong Kong's vibrant hockey community, this team is gearing up for a strong showing in Rotterdam.

squads.name: Men's Over-50
squads.description: The Men's Over-50 squad has a proud history on the international masters stage. Seasoned, tactical and never short of passion, this group is ready to fly the HK flag once again in Rotterdam.
